SELECT  
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID  TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME    GLOBAL_NAME,
  CAST
  (COALESCE(
     CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
      (CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN
      CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' THEN 
   CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN COALESCE(CAST(NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) ELSE COALESCE(CAST(NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) END
     WHEN (upper(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT) IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS', 'ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))  AND /*  NACAR.SAF_TYPE_CD = 'CREDIT_REBILL' */ UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL' 
   THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN COALESCE(CAST(NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) ELSE COALESCE(CAST(NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) END
      ELSE 0.0000000
      END
  ELSE 
      CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN COALESCE(CAST(NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
      ELSE COALESCE(CAST(NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
      END
    END)
  *
  (CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE ='REV' THEN 
      CAST((CAST(COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) * 
         (COALESCE(CAST(NATLGD.TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100.0000000)/100) /
         ( /*OA Q2FY15*/
	CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN   
	     CASE WHEN CAST(EL.ATTRIBUTE8 AS DECIMAL(27,12)) =0 THEN 1
         ELSE
         COALESCE(CAST(EL.ATTRIBUTE8 AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100.0000000)/100 
		 END
    ELSE 1
    END
) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
      (CASE WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY' OR (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ ) THEN COALESCE(CAST(EOCBILDA.INVOICE_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
      WHEN (upper(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT) in ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS', 'ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))   THEN 100.0000000 
       ELSE 100.0000000
      END)/10000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
  WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN
      CAST((COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) * 
      (CASE WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY' OR (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ ) THEN COALESCE(CAST(EOCBILDA.INVOICE_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
      WHEN (upper(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT) in ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS', 'ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))  THEN 100.0000000
       ELSE 100.0000000
      END)/10000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
  ELSE 100.0000000
  END)
  END , 0.0000000 ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) EXTENDED_QUANTITY
  ,CAST
  (COALESCE(
     CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
      (CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN
      CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' THEN 
   CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN COALESCE(CAST(NATIL_PAR.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) ELSE COALESCE(CAST(NATIL_PAR.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) END
     WHEN (upper(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT) IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS', 'ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))   AND /*  NACAR.SAF_TYPE_CD = 'CREDIT_REBILL' */ UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL' 
   THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN COALESCE(CAST(NATIL_PAR.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) ELSE COALESCE(CAST(NATIL_PAR.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) END
      ELSE 0.0000000
      END
  ELSE 
      CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN COALESCE(CAST(NATIL_PAR.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
      ELSE COALESCE(CAST(NATIL_PAR.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
      END
    END)
  *
  (CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE ='REV' THEN 
      CAST((CAST(COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) * 
         COALESCE(CAST(NATLGD.TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
      (CASE WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY' OR (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ ) THEN COALESCE(CAST(EOCBILDA.INVOICE_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
      WHEN (upper(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT) in ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS', 'ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))  THEN 100.0000000 
       ELSE 100.0000000
      END)/10000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
  WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN
      CAST((COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) * 
      (CASE WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY' OR (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ ) THEN COALESCE(CAST(EOCBILDA.INVOICE_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
      WHEN (upper(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT) in ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS', 'ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))  THEN 100.0000000
       ELSE 100.0000000
      END)/10000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
  ELSE 100.0000000
  END)
  END , 0.0000000 ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) TOP_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
  FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P  NCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SSORCTLG
   ON(SSORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID = NCR.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
   AND SSORCTLG.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
   ON (NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = SSORCTLG.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
   ON(SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON(NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
   ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
   AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
   AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
   ON(SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
   ON(NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL		/*OA Q2FY15*/
  ON(NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND EL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
   
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  /*OAQ1FY15 */
  ON (NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY     
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
   ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
   ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_BE_INV_LNS_DST_AL EOCBILDA
   ON ( EOCBILDA.BE_INVOICE_LINE_DIST_ID = EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15 
   AND EOCBILDA.GLOBAL_NAME= EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME 
   AND EOCBILDA.INVOICE_TYPE = 'Original Line')
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO    
   ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
   ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
   ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON(NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
   /*
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_CMDM_ADJ_REQUEST NACAR 
   ON ( NACAR.BK_SAF_ID_INT = NATL.BK_SAF_ID_INT 
   AND NACAR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SAF_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   AND NACAR.BK_COMPANY_CD = NATL.BK_SAF_COMPANY_CODE  ) 
   */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR
 ON NACAR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
 AND NACAR.GLOBAL_NAME     = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME
  
   
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
   WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
   AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)

FLAG.DV_REVENUE_FLG  ,              
NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT   ,  
NCR.GLOBAL_NAME  ,                 
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE BK_SS_CD     ,                 
AMT.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT    , 
AMT.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
AMT.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   ,   
KEY1.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD     ,         
KEY1.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD  ,          
KEY2.LINE_TYPE_CD  ,                
NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT SPLIT_PCT  ,                   
CAST(NCR.GL_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) GL_DTM   ,                     
CAST(NCR.GL_POSTED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) GL_POSTED_DTM   ,

'FOR REVENUE REPORTING'  REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE     ,

KEY1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,        
KEY2.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
KEY1.AR_TRX_KEY  ,

NCR.ORDER_NUMBER REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,

FLAG.DV_CHARGES_FLG    ,            
(CASE WHEN 
       (FLAG.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y' 
	AND FLAG.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG = 'N' 
	AND FLAG.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG = 'N' 
	AND FLAG.DV_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y'  
	/*AND AFLAG.DV_CHARGES_FLG = 'N'*//*pdubasi: commented the condition DV_CHARGES_FLG='N' as part of Q4FY14 LSS Release*/ 
	AND FLAG.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP = 'Y')
	THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' 
 END

KEY1.SHIPPED_DT SHIPPED_DT,                  
KEY2.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD    ,       
KEY2.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
AMT.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
KEY2.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME   ,     
KEY2.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD   ,     
FLAG.MAJOR_LINE_FLG   ,             
KEY1.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
KEY1.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
KEY1.SERVICE_TYPE_CD    ,           
KEY1.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT, 
AMT.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT   ,

KEY2.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD      ,      
KEY1.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  , 
KEY2.SALES_REP_NUM     ,            
CASE WHEN NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE = 'O' THEN  NCR.GL_DT  ELSE CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE)  END DV_FISCAL_DT  ,
NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
NCR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
NCR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
CASE  WHEN EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL 
 THEN CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='UO' THEN -996  ELSE -997 END
   ELSE EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
 END  as GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
COALESCE(SORR.NAME, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
NCR.AMOUNT  ,
NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P  NCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_KEY1_P KEY1
		ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = KEY1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
		AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = KEY1.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_KEY2_P KEY2
		ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = KEY2.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
		AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = KEY2.GLOBAL_NAME)		
INNER JOIN	$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FLAG_P FLAG
		ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = FLAG.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID
		AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = FLAG.GLOBAL_NAME)	
INNER JOIN	$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_AMOUNT_P AMT
		ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = AMT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
		AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = AMT.GLOBAL_NAME)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVNGLA
  ON ( NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID =  EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES  SORR
 ON NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = SORR.RULE_ID
 AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = SORR.GLOBAL_NAME

SELECT
RT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
,NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 
	CASE WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'QTC' THEN -9999
		WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'BV' THEN -8888
		ELSE -7777
	END	
ELSE SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,CASE WHEN SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN
		CASE WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= 'QTC' THEN -9999
		WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'BV' THEN -8888
		ELSE -7777
		END
ELSE SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY
END AS RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-997) AS ITEM_KEY
,COALESCE(SLS.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
,COALESCE(ORG.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE,'UNK') AS INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE   
,SLS.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM
,COALESCE(ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME 
,COALESCE(ESOT.NAME,'UNK') AS NAME
,SLS_V1.DISPATCH_DTM
,ORG.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT 
,SLS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE 
,X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY AS MTL_INV_ORG_KEY
,X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY AS MTL_ITEM_KEY
,X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS MTL_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY
,X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD  AS ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CODE
,X.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,X.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME
,BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY
,ORG.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG
,ORG.CG1_FLG

ELSE

				ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'
				END
			ELSE 
				CASE WHEN BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'AS_BUILT' 
							ELSE CASE WHEN ORG.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'STAND_COST_LCL' 
							                   ELSE  CASE WHEN BOM_OLD.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT  > '2013-11-17'  THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'  END 
							           END
				END
			END
		/*END
	ELSE 'STAND_COST_GBL'
	END 
	ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' 
	END
END	
AS LINE_FLG_CD*//* Commented  ends as part of Q1FY15*/
/* sdande : 6/20/2014 as part of q1Fy15  New code implemented as part of Q1FY15*/
,CASE WHEN (NP.ITEM_KEY IS NULL OR SLS_V1.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD in ('ELECTRONIC','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIVERY','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIV'))  THEN 'UNKNOWN'   
else 
CASE WHEN ORG.EP_AB_BOM_COGS_CALC_ENBLD_FLG= 'Y' THEN                            
 CASE WHEN SLS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'STANDARD' THEN 
CASE WHEN X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN
CASE WHEN X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='COST OF GOODS SOLD' THEN 'MTL_TRX_10008' ELSE 'MTL_TRX_33' END
ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'
END
ELSE 
CASE WHEN BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'AS_BUILT' ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' END
END
ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' 
END 
end
AS LINE_FLG_CD /* sdande : 6/20/2014 as part of q1Fy15 Changes end as part of Q1FY15*/ 
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATE_DATETIME
FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P  RT
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON RT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON RT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NAT.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = RT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT   = RT.ORDER_HEADER_ID
AND NSO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT 
ON ESOT.NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME 
AND ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS
ON RT.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SLS.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V1
ON SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND SLS_V1.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG ORG
ON SLS.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE = ORG.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK BOM_OLD
ON  SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BOM_OLD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND SLS.PRODUCT_KEY = BOM_OLD.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
AND BOM_OLD.PROCESS_STATUS_CD = 'BOM_PROCESS_SUCCESS'

/*COGs Q2FY13 Release Changes */

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN  BOM
ON CAST(TRIM(SLS.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)||'-'||TRIM(SLS.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT) AS VARCHAR(50))=BOM.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  
AND SLS.PRODUCT_KEY = BOM.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
AND ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = BOM.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	(SELECT  MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY, MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY, MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME,MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME,TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P RT1
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
	ON RT1.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
	ON(NP1.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = RT1.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
	INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS1
	ON RT1.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS1.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
	AND NSSC1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SLS1.SS_CODE
	INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V11
	ON SLS1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V11.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
	AND SLS_V11.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG ORG1
	ON SLS1.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE = ORG1.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE
	INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MTL1
	ON MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = ORG1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
	AND MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY      = NP1.ITEM_KEY            
	AND MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = SLS1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
	INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE MTL_TYPE1
	ON MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = MTL1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
	AND MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = MTL1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME
	INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL TRX_DET1
	ON TRX_DET1.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = MTL1.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
	WHERE  1=1 
	AND 
	(	(MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'COGS Recognition'
		AND MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order'
		AND TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='Cost of Goods Sold'
		)
		OR
		( MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order issue'
		AND MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order'
		AND TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='Deferred Cost of Goods Sold'
		)
	)
	AND ORG1.CG1_FLG = 'Y'
	AND COALESCE(CAST(SLS_V11.DISPATCH_DTM AS DATE), ORG1.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT  + INTERVAL '1' DAY)  >=  ORG1.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT
	AND SLS1.ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'STANDARD'
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY, MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY, MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ORDER BY MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME,MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME,TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ASC) = 1
	) X
ON X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY      = NP.ITEM_KEY            
AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
   WHERE RT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
   AND RT.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)

                        NSORDTV.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE IN ( 'Demo','Evaluation','Int" l Demo','Intl Demo') THEN 'Y'

CASE WHEN ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL OR EST.TERRITORY_CODE = 'UNKNOWN'  OR EST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE <> 'CORP. REVENUE' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP,
'=' SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
	ON( NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV

SELECT 
TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ,
GLOBAL_NAME ,
GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT ,
GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT 
FROM (
SELECT
NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
COALESCE(CAST(
(CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN 
CAST(NCR.AMOUNT * (CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
THEN 1.000000
ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
END) 
AS DECIMAL(26,7))
ELSE NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
END)* COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
CAST(
COALESCE(
(CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN
CAST
( CAST((CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
END 
ELSE 0.0000000
END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
ELSE 0.0000000
END
END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
COALESCE(CAST(
CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
(CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN
CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' THEN 
WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
ELSE 0.0000000
END
ELSE 
WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
END) END * ( CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN (ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000) * WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT ELSE WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT END)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
/* :penketa DEFAULTING ICMS-ADJ TO ZERO AS PART OF Q1FY15 BY SC-LSS*/
COALESCE(CAST(
CASE WHEN ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
CASE WHEN (NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE '%ICMS-ADJ%'  OR NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING')  THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN
  (CAST( WDNRTSC.DV_REV_STANDARD_COST_AMT 
  * 
  WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7))* 
  COALESCE(CAST(NATLGD.COGS_PCT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000))/100
WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 0.0000000
WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 0.0000000
ELSE 0.0000000
END
end 
END AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)  DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
/*END OF CHANGES FOR ICMS-ADJ BY SC-LSS*/
CASE WHEN (UPPER(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT) IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))AND /* NACAR.SAF_TYPE_CD = 'CREDIT_REBILL' */ UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL'  AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 0 
ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY END DV_EXTENDED_QTY , 
/* OA Q3FY14 */
CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN EL.ATTRIBUTE8 ELSE 100 END as ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT, 
CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN (
CAST( ((ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000)* NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE)/(case when (DV_EXTENDED_QTY) = 0.0000000 then 1.0000000 else ABS(DV_EXTENDED_QTY) end ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) )
ELSE NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE END as UNIT_PRICE,
CAST(COALESCE(
CAST(
CAST(
(CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 
CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' THEN
WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY
ELSE 0.0000000
END
ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY
END) *
(CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'Trade-In Return' THEN 0.0000000 
ELSE CAST(UNIT_PRICE AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
END) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
*
( CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.0000000 
ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
END )
AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
CAST(
COALESCE( CASE WHEN BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN
COALESCE(
CAST(CAST(
CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.000000 
ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) END AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))*
CAST(COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))/100,0.0000000)
ELSE 0.0000000
END , 0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P NCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NBS 
 ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NBS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
/*END OF CHANGES Q1FY15 BY SC-LSS*/
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL

AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLN

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD

ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )

/*
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_CMDM_ADJ_REQUEST NACAR 
ON ( NACAR.BK_SAF_ID_INT = NATL.BK_SAF_ID_INT 
AND NACAR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SAF_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY

*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR

AND NACAR.GLOBAL_NAME     = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO 
ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT 
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_EXT_QTY_P WDNRTEQ

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_BASE_PRC_P WDNRTBP

ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTSC.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID

/* OA Q3FY14 */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL

ON EL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = NSOLOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT

WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
) A

SELECT
WI_FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,WI_FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
,WI_FLG_CD.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
FROM
(   
/*STEP: 1 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR MATERIAL TRANSACTIONS FOR 10008*/
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(X.UNIT_USD_AMT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FLG_CD_P  FLG_CD1
INNER JOIN 
(
SELECT
Z.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
,Z.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY
,Z.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SUM(CASE WHEN RNK_QTY = 1 THEN MTL_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS COMP_MTL_QTY
,SUM(CASE WHEN RNK_AMT = 1 THEN CAL_COST ELSE 0 END) AS COMP_MTL_AMT
,COMP_MTL_AMT/COMP_MTL_QTY AS UNIT_USD_AMT
FROM
(
SELECT 
ABS(MTL.TRANSACTION_QTY) AS MTL_QTY
,ABS(COALESCE(TRX_DET.RU_DR_USD_AMT,0)) + ABS(COALESCE(TRX_DET.RU_CR_USD_AMT,0))  AS CAL_COST
,MTL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
,MTL.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY
,MTL.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRX_DET.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY  ORDER BY TRX_DET.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY  ASC) AS RNK_AMT
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  ORDER BY MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  ASC) AS RNK_QTY
FROM
$$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL TRX_DET
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MTL
ON TRX_DET.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
WHERE MTL.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'COGS Recognition'
AND MTL.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order'
AND TRX_DET.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD  = 'Cost of Goods Sold'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 
			FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FLG_CD_P FIX1 
			WHERE MTL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = FIX1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
			AND MTL.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY      = FIX1.ITEM_KEY            
			AND MTL.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = FIX1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
			AND FIX1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'MTL_TRX_10008')
) Z
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) X
ON X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY    = FLG_CD1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY                 =     FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY            
AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY     = FLG_CD1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
WHERE FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'MTL_TRX_10008'
UNION ALL
/*STEP: 1 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR MATERIAL TRANSACTIONS FOR 33*/
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(X.UNIT_USD_AMT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FLG_CD_P  FLG_CD1
INNER JOIN 
(
SELECT
Z.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
,Z.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY
,Z.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SUM(CASE WHEN RNK_QTY = 1 THEN MTL_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS COMP_MTL_QTY
,SUM(CASE WHEN RNK_AMT = 1 THEN CAL_COST ELSE 0 END) AS COMP_MTL_AMT
,COMP_MTL_AMT/COMP_MTL_QTY AS UNIT_USD_AMT
FROM
(
SELECT 
ABS(MTL.TRANSACTION_QTY) AS MTL_QTY
,ABS(COALESCE(TRX_DET.RU_DR_USD_AMT,0)) + ABS(COALESCE(TRX_DET.RU_CR_USD_AMT,0))  AS CAL_COST
,MTL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
,MTL.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY
,MTL.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRX_DET.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY  ORDER BY TRX_DET.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY  ASC) AS RNK_AMT
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  ORDER BY MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  ASC) AS RNK_QTY
FROM
$$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL TRX_DET
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MTL
ON TRX_DET.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
WHERE MTL.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order issue'
AND MTL.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order'
AND TRX_DET.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD  = 'Deferred Cost of Goods Sold'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 
			FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FLG_CD_P FIX1 
			WHERE MTL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = FIX1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
			AND MTL.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY      = FIX1.ITEM_KEY            
			AND MTL.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = FIX1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
			AND FIX1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'MTL_TRX_33')
) Z
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) X
ON X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY    = FLG_CD1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY                 =     FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY            
AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY     = FLG_CD1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
WHERE FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'MTL_TRX_33'
/*STEP: 2 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR AS BUILT*/
UNION ALL

FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID

,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FLG_CD_P   FLG_CD1
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK BOM
ON FLG_CD1.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BOM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

SELECT

,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE  COALESCE(BOM.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FLG_CD_P   FLG_CD1
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON FLG_CD1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE = NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN BOM
ON CAST(TRIM(NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)||'-'||TRIM(NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT) AS VARCHAR(50))=BOM.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  
AND FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY = BOM.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
AND NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = BOM.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
WHERE FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'AS_BUILT'

/*STEP: 3 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR LOCAL ORG*/
UNION ALL
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(X.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FLG_CD_P   FLG_CD1
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT 
CSC.ITEM_KEY
,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME
,CSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME,CSC.ITEM_KEY,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME ORDER BY CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC) AS RNK
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FLG_CD_P  FLG_CD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_STANDARD_COST CSC
ON CSC.ITEM_KEY  = FLG_CD.ITEM_KEY 
AND CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME = FLG_CD.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
AND CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME <=  COALESCE(FLG_CD.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM,FLG_CD.AR_TRX_DATETIME )
WHERE FLG_CD.LINE_FLG_CD = 'STAND_COST_LCL'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME,CSC.ITEM_KEY,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME ORDER BY CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC) = 1
) X
ON FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY = X.ITEM_KEY
AND FLG_CD1.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE = X.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME
/*AND X.RNK = 1*/
AND X.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
AND X.GLOBAL_NAME = FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE  FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'STAND_COST_LCL'

,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,0 AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY

)WI_FLG_CD
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  WHERE WI_FLG_CD.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
  AND NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
  AND WI_FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT 
NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(((CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'Trade-In Return' THEN 0 ELSE NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE END)),0) <> 0 THEN
	CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV') THEN 
	COALESCE(
		CASE WHEN (CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) < NPPT.START_TV_DATE) THEN 0.0000000
		ELSE CAST(NPPT.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
		END,0.0000000) 
	ELSE 0.0000000
	END
ELSE 0.0000000
END USD_BASE_PRICE 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P NCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
	ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
     LEFT OUTER  JOIN  /*OAQ1FY15 */
 (SELECT NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY , 
 NATIL_PAR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS P_SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY AS PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG, NATIL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE, NATIL.SS_CODE               
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
 ON COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ) DNATIL 
  ON  NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = DNATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=DNATIL.SS_CODE                 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
        ON(NP.ITEM_KEY                       = CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN DNATIL.PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY ELSE DNATIL.PRODUCT_KEY END)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPT
	ON(NPPT.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
	AND CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN NPPT.START_TV_DATE AND NPPT.END_TV_DATE
	AND NPPT.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List')
INNER JOIN (SELECT 
		NCR1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
		NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME,
		NP1.ITEM_KEY ITEM_KEY,
		MAX(NPPT1.START_TV_DATE) MAX_START_DATE
	     FROM
		$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P NCR1
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME)
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT1 
			ON( SAT1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR1.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
			AND SAT1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
			ON( NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT1.AR_TRX_KEY)
         LEFT OUTER  JOIN  /*OAQ1FY15 */
 (SELECT NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY , 
 NATIL_PAR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS P_SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY AS PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG, NATIL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE, NATIL.SS_CODE         
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
 ON COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ) DNATIL 
  ON  NCR1.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = DNATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=DNATIL.SS_CODE                  
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
     ON(NP1.ITEM_KEY = CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN DNATIL.PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY ELSE DNATIL.PRODUCT_KEY END)
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPT1
			ON(NPPT1.ITEM_KEY = NP1.ITEM_KEY
			AND NPPT1.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List'
			AND CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN NPPT1.START_TV_DATE AND NPPT1.END_TV_DATE
		)
	     GROUP BY
		NCR1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
		NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME,
		NP1.ITEM_KEY) MAX_DATE
ON(MAX_DATE.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
	AND MAX_DATE.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND MAX_DATE.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
	AND MAX_DATE.MAX_START_DATE = NPPT.START_TV_DATE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
	ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
	AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN
	ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO				
	ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV			
	ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT			
	ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
		WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
		AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
